# Grant Expectation Guardrail via SBDC FAQ

## User need
Use when users ask for startup grants. The FAQ warns that grants for small-business startup are rare, with limited exceptions like SBIR/STTR or rare community programs. Route to SBDC for funding strategy and avoid grant guarantees.
